page_title: Chapter 60: In the Absence of God
text:
Synopsis

Chapter Notes

The justification for Scar's motives in Fullmetal Alchemist: Prince of the Dawn comes from this chapter, when the neighboring country Aerugo refuses to give the Ishbalan refugees asylum.

See also

Episode 30: The Ishvalan War of Extermination (2009 series)
